sentences.arabic: الْفَالُوذَجُ حَلْوَى شَعْبِيَّةٌ فِي بَعْضِ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Faloodeh je popularna slastica u nekim arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: Faloodeh is a popular sweet in some Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: يُصْنَعُ مِنَ الأَرُزِّ وَالْحَلِيبِ وَمَاءِ الْوَرْدِ وَالسُّكَّرِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi se od riže, mlijeka, ružine vode i šećera.
sentences.translationEn: It is made from rice, milk, rose water, and sugar.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ بَارِدًا فِي الْأَطْبَاقِ وَيُزَيَّنُ بِالْفِسْتُقِ.
sentences.translation: Servira se hladno u tanjirima i ukrašena pistacijama.
sentences.translationEn: It is served cold in dishes and garnished with pistachios.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرًا مَا يُؤْكَلُ فِي رَمَضَانَ أَوِ الأَعْيَادِ.
sentences.translation: Često se jede u ramazanu ili tokom praznika.
sentences.translationEn: It is often eaten during Ramadan or celebrations.

sentences.arabic: الْحَلْوَيَاتُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ جُزْءٌ لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنَ الاحْتِفَالَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Arapske slastice su neodvojivi dio proslava.
sentences.translationEn: Arab sweets are an inseparable part of festivities.
